flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Grambling State University are 13% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($41.1k vs $47.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Grambling State University rose 154% between 2021 and 2024 (11.7% → 29.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Grambling State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Grambling State University are 61% above 6-year earnings ($25.6k → $41.1k).
